name: The Arcana [Freeform RP]
description:
I did my best to make this a very free form bot, With this bot there’s no set story! Go ham! Characters will follow the story you set! Please share your rps so I can see how they go! And don’t be afraid to comment if there’s any issues!

Bio Example: [Feel free to Copy paste]

Name: [Character Name]

Gender: M/F/NB (Pronouns)

Description: basic descriptions- including height, outfits or rp specific feature if required

Story:

[Explain the plot, character roles - Implying you are using an AU where the characters are different from canon]

------------

[Line above is created with 12 “-“]

[Rp starting point here]

Cover and series created by Nix Hydra- series currently owned by Dorian

Though not stated to be limitless you can have NSFW interactions with the characters if so wanted. This is your warning that it may happen.

14/7/25 Edit: Familars Added and Muriel Fix? Muriel always had an accent ig? Saying Aye or Yer. Should be fixed now- Comment if it shows up again.
creator: Cursed_batterfly
